overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district at dusk. The player character moves from a covered neon-lit walkway up stairs into a vast open plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered walkway with purple neon ceiling lights. To the left, a street with palm trees and moving vehicles is visible, along with large digital billboards. The player walks forward, passing digital advertisements on the right wall as the ceiling lights shift to red.

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the covered walkway, the scene is dominated by massive digital advertisements on both walls and a ceiling with cycling neon colors shifting through blue, green, and yellow. The player follows a pedestrian toward a stairway at the corridor's end, passing concrete planters with greenery.

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a wide concrete stairway, leaving the covered walkway behind. As they climb, massive glass skyscrapers and holographic billboards become visible at the top. The lighting transitions from artificial neon to the mixed glow of dusk and city lights as the open plaza entrance approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza surrounded by skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a vast open plaza, the player is surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The area features outdoor cafe seating with white umbrellas and scattered pedestrians. The player navigates through the plaza, passing digital advertising kiosks and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with futuristic blue building structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the player approaching and passing a distinctive blue curved building with metallic exterior. The plaza continues with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements visible in the background. The player turns left to navigate around the blue structure, heading toward another building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit corridor into a sprawling, futuristic urban plaza at dusk. It begins under a covered walkway where purple ceiling lights and digital billboards line the path, with the lighting shifting to red as the camera moves past a street of palm trees. As the player follows a pedestrian deeper into the corridor, the ceiling cycles through blue, green, and yellow hues before the path opens up to a wide concrete stairway. The scene then transitions from artificial neon to the mixed glow of twilight as the camera ascends the stairs, revealing a skyline of massive glass skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. Finally, the view expands into a vast open plaza filled with white cafe umbrellas and digital kiosks, moving past a distinctive curved blue metallic building toward another entrance.
